core_mechanism: autoparametric (internal) resonance between two nonlinearly coupled oscillator modes, in which pumping one mode transfers energy to a second mode only above an activation threshold, with amplitude saturation and phase synchronization organizing the response near resonance manifolds
brief_reason: The abstract reduces the system to a two-mode autoparametric resonance model whose behavior is governed by detuning, drive amplitude, and damping, with a common origin in autoparametric resonance, nonlinear saturation, and coupling-induced synchronization and a sharp activation threshold.
